description: Node label definitions for the Synapse steel-plant knowledge graph. 'source' on each property is 'real' (derived from a downloaded real-world dataset in synapse/data/), 'synthetic' (generated), or 'hybrid' (synthetic values whose structure/ranges are informed by a real dataset).

labels.label: Coil
labels.description: A single produced steel coil, the core traceability unit of the plant.

properties.name: coil_id
properties.notes: Unique coil identifier, e.g. COIL-000001

properties.name: grade
properties.notes: IS 2062/IS 1786 style values, e.g. Fe415, Fe500, E250

properties.name: thickness_mm
properties.notes: Coil thickness in millimeters

properties.name: width_mm
properties.notes: Coil width in millimeters

properties.name: weight_kg
properties.notes: Coil weight in kilograms

properties.name: heat_number
properties.notes: Heat/batch identifier linking coil to a melt

properties.name: production_date
properties.notes: Date the coil was produced

properties.name: status
properties.notes: One of: in_stock, dispatched, on_hold

properties.name: equipment_id
properties.notes: Denormalized FK to Equipment.equipment_id (equipment that produced the coil); persisted on the node and used to build the PRODUCED_AT edge

properties.name: material_ids
properties.notes: Denormalized list of FKs to RawMaterial.material_id (materials used in the coil); persisted on the node and used to build MADE_FROM edges

labels.label: Equipment
labels.description: A physical plant asset in a hot-rolling-mill + blast-furnace steel plant (Rajendra Steel Plant, Mumbai Unit). Grounded to specific named machinery types.

properties.name: equipment_id
properties.notes: Unique equipment identifier, type-prefixed, e.g. EQ-BF-01, EQ-RHF-02, EQ-FMS-01

properties.name: name
properties.notes: Human-readable equipment name, e.g. 'Reheating Furnace #1'

properties.name: type
properties.notes: Machine type (snake_case), one of: blast_furnace, hot_blast_stove, sinter_plant_feeder, electric_arc_furnace, ladle_furnace, continuous_casting_machine, reheating_furnace, roughing_mill_stand, finishing_mill_stand, coiler_unit, runout_table, overhead_crane, conveyor_system

properties.name: installed_date
properties.notes: Date equipment was commissioned

properties.name: location
properties.notes: Plant area/zone, e.g. 'Rajendra Steel Plant, Mumbai Unit - Rolling Mill'

properties.name: real_data_link
properties.notes: AI4I Product ID/Type remapped, used to join equipment to real sensor/failure records; null until AI4I is ingested

properties.name: key_specifications
properties.notes: Machine-type-specific spec object (e.g. reheating furnace: capacity_tph/fuel/max_temp_C; coiler: coil_weight_capacity_t/wrapping_tension_kN). Illustrative, industry-typical values grounded in public references, not proprietary OEM data

properties.name: typical_failure_modes
properties.notes: Realistic failure modes for that specific machine type (e.g. reheating furnace: refractory wear, burner malfunction, thermocouple failure), grounded in public references

properties.name: maintenance_interval
properties.notes: Preventive-maintenance frequency, e.g. monthly, quarterly, 6-monthly, annual

properties.name: failure_id
properties.notes: Unique failure event identifier

properties.name: equipment_id
properties.notes: Denormalized FK to Equipment.equipment_id (equipment that experienced the failure); persisted on the node and used to build the EXPERIENCED edge

properties.name: failure_mode
properties.notes: AI4I dataset TWF/HDF/PWF/OSF/RNF remapped to steel failure terms (e.g. tool wear -> roll wear failure)

properties.name: timestamp
properties.notes: Date and time the failure was recorded

properties.name: sensor_values
properties.notes: AI4I-shaped torque/tool-wear/temperature values, currently SYNTHETIC until the AI4I 2020 dataset is downloaded and ingested; retains a source_failure_flag trace field (TWF/HDF/PWF/OSF/RNF). Flip source back to 'real' once AI4I is used.

properties.name: impacted_coil_ids
properties.notes: Quality-impact tagging: coils produced on this equipment in a window around the failure whose quality tests have linked deviations. Derived from the existing TESTED_BY/FAILED_STANDARD chain — no new QT links, deviation rate untouched.

properties.name: impacted_failed_tests
properties.notes: Count of deviation-linked quality tests attributed to this failure's window (answers 'what did this failure cost in quality terms')

labels.label: RCA
labels.description: Root Cause Analysis record for a failure.

properties.name: rca_id
properties.notes: Unique RCA record identifier

properties.name: failure_id
properties.notes: Denormalized FK to Failure.failure_id (failure this RCA diagnoses); persisted on the node and used to build the DIAGNOSED_BY edge

properties.name: rca_date
properties.notes: Date the RCA was completed; generated as the linked Failure.timestamp date plus a realistic 1-5 day investigation lag, so it always follows the failure

properties.name: root_cause_text
properties.notes: Free-text root cause narrative

properties.name: corrective_action
properties.notes: Free-text corrective action taken

properties.name: procedure_ref
properties.notes: FK to Procedure.procedure_id — the governing procedure this RCA reviewed. Matched to the failed equipment's PM/inspection SOP.

properties.name: violated_step
properties.notes: Which step of procedure_ref was missed/violated (quoted step + mode-specific violation phrasing) — lets the synthesizer correlate recurring procedure gaps across units

properties.name: industry_reference
properties.notes: GENERAL domain-knowledge citation for why this failure-mechanism CLASS occurs (object: {source_name, source_url, summary_text}), researched from public engineering sources. Present on golden-path hero RCAs. Deliberately separate from plant-specific facts — it explains the mechanism in general, it is NOT a claim about this plant's specific equipment. Cited by the synthesizer as [Industry Reference: <source_name>].

properties.name: analyst
properties.notes: References Technician.technician_id who authored the RCA

labels.label: Procedure
labels.description: A documented standard operating procedure (SOP) for operating or maintaining equipment.

properties.name: procedure_id
properties.notes: Unique procedure identifier

properties.name: title
properties.notes: Procedure title

properties.name: steps_text
properties.notes: Full step-by-step procedure text, used for RAG ingestion

properties.name: equipment_ref
properties.notes: References Equipment.equipment_id this procedure applies to

labels.label: Technician
labels.description: A plant employee performing maintenance, quality, or RCA work.

properties.name: technician_id
properties.notes: Unique technician identifier

properties.name: name
properties.notes: Technician full name

properties.name: role
properties.notes: e.g. Maintenance Engineer, Quality Inspector, Shift Supervisor

properties.name: shift
properties.notes: e.g. A, B, C shift

properties.name: certification
properties.notes: Relevant certification or qualification

labels.label: QualityTest
labels.description: A quality inspection/test performed on a coil.

properties.name: test_id
properties.notes: Unique quality test identifier

properties.name: coil_id
properties.notes: Denormalized FK to Coil.coil_id (coil that was tested); persisted on the node and used to build the TESTED_BY edge

properties.name: feature_values
properties.notes: Steel Plates Faults dataset, all 27 feature columns (X_Minimum..SigmoidOfAreas), stored as a JSON blob

properties.name: fault_type
properties.notes: Steel Plates Faults dataset, the 7 one-hot fault columns (Pastry/Z_Scratch/K_Scatch/Stains/Dirtiness/Bumps/Other_Faults) remapped to a single categorical label

properties.name: test_date
properties.notes: Date the test was performed

properties.name: standard_ref
properties.notes: References Standard.standard_id this test was evaluated against

labels.label: Standard
labels.description: A quality/compliance standard or code clause.

properties.name: standard_id
properties.notes: Unique standard identifier

properties.name: name
properties.notes: e.g. BIS IS:1786, BIS IS:2062, ASTM A370, The Factories Act 1948. (OISD standards were removed as out-of-scope for iron & steel; IS:226 retained only as a withdrawn/superseded marker.)

properties.name: clause_text
properties.notes: Paraphrased scope/rule text for the standard; illustrative values only (full standard text is licensed)

properties.name: superseded_by
properties.notes: Present only on withdrawn/superseded standards; FK to the standard_id of the replacement (e.g. IS:226 -> STD-IS2062-01)

labels.label: Deviation
labels.description: A flagged deviation from spec/process, linked to a coil and/or equipment.

properties.name: deviation_id
properties.notes: Unique deviation identifier

properties.name: coil_id_fk
properties.notes: References Coil.coil_id, if the deviation is coil-related

properties.name: failure_id_fk
properties.notes: References Failure.failure_id when the deviation is attributed to a specific failure (nearest failure on the same equipment / within the production window). Connective tissue only — deviation counts unchanged.

properties.name: equipment_id_fk
properties.notes: References Equipment.equipment_id, if the deviation is equipment-related

properties.name: description
properties.notes: Free-text deviation description, informed by real fault distribution from the Steel Plates Faults dataset

properties.name: severity
properties.notes: e.g. low, medium, high, critical

labels.label: RawMaterial
labels.description: A raw material or input consumed in steel production.

properties.name: material_id
properties.notes: Unique raw material identifier

properties.name: type
properties.notes: e.g. iron ore, scrap, ferro-alloy; category list and structure informed by ERP BOM sheet and steel_bom_grades.csv

properties.name: composition
properties.notes: Chemical/material composition breakdown, informed by the Steel Manufacturing Materials dataset (steel_bom_grades.csv)

properties.name: supplier_id
properties.notes: Identifier of the supplying vendor

labels.label: Document
labels.description: A managed document (procedure, report, certificate, RCA writeup, etc.) with a pointer into the vector store.

properties.name: document_id
properties.notes: Unique document identifier

properties.name: title
properties.notes: Document title

properties.name: doc_type
properties.notes: e.g. SOP, RCA Report, Test Certificate, Audit Report

properties.name: vector_ref
properties.notes: Bridges to the Chroma vector store collection/id for this document's embedding

properties.name: source_type
properties.notes: 'synthetic' marks generated narrative records (e.g. the per-failure work_order incident reports) so retrieval consumers can flag data character; absent on the original corpus

properties.name: related_entity_id
properties.notes: Denormalized polymorphic FK to the primary entity this document is about (Failure/Deviation/Procedure/Equipment id, per doc_type); persisted on the node and used to build the DOCUMENTED_IN edge
